steps.title: Use extinction duration
steps.content: The passage says the habitat problem becomes more concerning the longer a species has been extinct. The relevant data point is therefore which candidate species has been extinct for the longest time.

steps.title: Choose the oldest extinction
steps.content: A and D describe species that went extinct recently compared with prehistoric candidates. C misstates the comparison, since the woolly mammoth date is not earlier than the saber-toothed cat's 11,000-year figure. The species with the longest extinction duration best supports the statement. The answer is B.
